# init(floatLiteral:)

**Initializer**

Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from a floating-point seconds value.

## Declaration

```swift
init(floatLiteral value: Double)
```

## Creating Scheduler Time Strides

- **init(_:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from the given time interval.
- **init(exactly:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from a binary integer type.
- **init(integerLiteral:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from an integer seconds value.
